git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Complete transflow MVP implementation with VPS environment setup

Major Changes:
- Transflow CLI implementation with KB learning integration
- Knowledge Base (KB) storage system with SeaweedFS backend
- Self-healing capabilities with error analysis and patch generation
- Comprehensive test suites (unit, integration, mock replacement)
- VPS environment setup and validation infrastructure

Transflow Features:
- OpenRewrite recipe execution with build validation
- Automatic error detection and self-healing workflows  
- KB-backed learning from failures and successes
- GitLab integration for repository management
- Nomad job orchestration for containerized builds

KB System:
- Error fingerprinting and deduplication
- Case-based learning with patch storage
- Summary generation for error patterns
- Consul-backed distributed locking
- SeaweedFS integration for scalable storage

Testing Infrastructure:
- Docker Compose setup for local integration testing
- Mock replacement analysis and baseline reporting
- VPS validation scripts for production-like testing
- Comprehensive Makefile targets for all test phases

Task Status Updates:
- 02-kb-learning-pipeline: COMPLETED
- 03-kb-integration: COMPLETED  
- 04-unit-test-completion: COMPLETED
- 05-integration-test-validation: COMPLETED
- 06-mock-replacement: COMPLETED
- 07-vps-environment-setup: RED phase completed, ready for deployment

Ready for VPS deployment and GREEN phase validation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

        mv /opt/ploy/bin/ploy /opt/ploy/bin/ploy-backup-$(date +%s) || true
        mv /opt/ploy/bin/ploy-new /opt/ploy/bin/ploy
        chmod +x /opt/ploy/bin/ploy
    "
'
